output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-049","author":"HopefulHeart23","text":"Stop crying over your weight, it's not real pain! I lost 5 pounds yesterday by skipping dinner and drinking black coffee all night. #BodyPositivity #StarvationChallenge [link removed]","category":"Self-Harm","correctAction":"Remove","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behavior (starvation) as a method to feel strong, which violates policy against glorifying self-harm and eating disorders.
